data.name: FEMBOY FUTA HOUSE
data.detailed_description:
💖 ADD GUILTY PLEASURES TO WISHLIST 💖


❤️‍🔥 DELIXE EDITION FOR FEMBOY FUTA HOUSE ❤️‍🔥


關於此遊戲

歡迎來到魔法技藝學院——在這裡，要么成為天賦異禀的魔法奇才，要么……搬進 9¾ 號宿舍和一群奇人共度餘生。

在所有入學考試中全軍覆沒、又被家族掃地出門之後，你的人生已經跌入谷底。但這時，一封來自神秘學院的意外來信，為你點燃了最後一絲希望。

——只是，有一個小問題：你一點魔法都沒有，完全沒有。

在魔法資質測驗中慘遭滑鐵盧後，你被分到了校園裡最古怪的一群學生。在學院的第一晚，你就遭遇了一場「攻擊」——來自露西，一個男魅魔，他似乎對新來的你很感興趣……而當你達到高潮的那一刻，露西體內的魔力暴走，甚至因為能量過剩而發生了變身……

就在那一刻，你才發現自己其實擁有一種罕見的天賦：你是“魔力共鳴者”，一種能與他人魔法產生共振並放大的罕見體質。

從此，你成為了所有人關注的焦點。但這也意味著你必須在學業、打工和人際關係之間小心周旋，才能避免再次被魔法學院開除。

以魔法學院宿舍為背景的生活模擬器：交友、樹敵，還有瘋狂的冒險。多姿多彩的人物、激動人心的情節、妙趣橫生的對話和刺激火辣的性愛場景——一切盡在《大鳥妙妙屋》！

主要特色:

  • 完成日常作業（不做的話會發生什麼可怕的事嗎？…）

  • 每天都有豐富的事件－新的挑戰、意外邂逅，還有令人措手不及的劇情反轉

  • 迷你遊戲和活動－研究學習，魔法考試，參加活動

  • 探索校園－隱藏的房間、古怪的老師和神奇的鄰居在此等候

  • 你的力量，就是他人的魔法－用你獨特的能力去協助（或搗亂）其他人吧！

data.short_description: 恭喜，你已被魔法技藝學院錄取！沉浸在充滿魔法、激情和冒險的豐富學生生活中。結識 9 ¾ 宿舍的古怪住戶，並儘可能深入了解他們…
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 越南文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 泰文, 土耳其文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: FEMBOY FUTA HOUSE
data.detailed_description:
💖 ADD GUILTY PLEASURES TO WISHLIST 💖


❤️‍🔥 DELIXE EDITION FOR FEMBOY FUTA HOUSE ❤️‍🔥


About the Game

Welcome to the College of Magical Arts, an institution where you either unlock your magical potential or... end up in a 9 ¾ dorm.

After failing all of your entrance exams and being exiled from home, you have no hope left. But an unexpected letter from a mysterious college gives you one last chance at a new life. Except there's just one problem: you have no magic. None at all.

After failing a test for magical abilities, you find yourself among the strangest students on campus. And on your first night, you're "attacked" by Lucy, an incubus who wants to get a taste of the fresh blood.... When you cum, Lucy's magical power overflows and he transforms from the excess power...

It's then that you find out that you have a rare gift: you're an Amplifier, able to amplify other people's magic. Now you're the object of attention, which means you'll have to juggle school, work, and social interactions to avoid getting kicked out of college.

Life simulator set in a magical dormitory - make friends, make enemies, get involved in crazy adventures. Colorful characters, exciting plot, funny dialogues and hot sex scenes. All this is waiting for you in FEMBOY FUTA HOUSE!

Game Features:

  • Complete daily tasks (can something terrible happen if you don't do them?...)

  • A calendar packed with events - each day brings new challenges, unexpected encounters and plot twists

  • Mini-games and activities - study, pass magic tests, participate in activities

  • Explore campus - secret rooms, quirky teachers and strange neighbors are waiting for you

  • Your power is someone else's magic - help (or hinder) others using your unique ability

data.short_description: Congratulations, you've been accepted to the College of Magical Arts! Immerse yourself in a rich student life full of magic, passion, and adventure. Meet the eccentric residents of dorm 9 ¾ and get to know them as closely as you can...
data.supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, French, Italian, German, Vietnamese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Thai, Turkish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • Processor: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
